arts.ttl: Chelsea 5-0 Morecambe: Match report & talking points from FA Cup trouncing
arts.sum: As Chelsea found out on Saturday after Morecambe's Harry Burgoyne crept off his line to save Nkunku's penalty, there was no VAR in use across the FA Cup third round . In a display which secures Chelsea's passage to the FA Cup fourth round, not many of the club's B-team stated a strong case to be promoted to the Premier League XI.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss issues Reece James update following return from injury
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca says he has to be “careful” with Reece James as he eases the defender back into the side following his recovery from injury. The 25-year-old made his first appearance since November when he started for the Blues in their 5-0 win over Morecambe in the third round of the FA Cup. […] The post Chelsea boss issues Reece James update following return from injury first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 5-0 Morecambe: Player ratings as Tosin & Felix star in FA Cup rout
arts.sum: After a hardly convincing first half, Maresca made three changes at the break, introducing the in-form Jadon Sancho, Malo Gusto and Marc Cucurella. Tosin converted a second strike from outside the box before Joao Felix notched a brace of his own in little more than 100 seconds.
